name: mcp_binder
description: Research framework for turning MCP DNS rebinding into a live attack lab.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:syntax && npm run validate:contracts && npm run validate:service && npm run validate:installer && npm run validate:manifest
scripts.validate:syntax: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/messages.js && node --check src/scanner.js && node --check src/rebind-evidence.js && node --check src/reporting-labels.js && node --check src/rebind-url.js && node --check src/dashboard-client.js && node --check src/runtime-config.js && node --check src/rebind-bridge-core.js && node --check services/dashboard-server.js && node --check ui/dashboard.js && node --check ui/operator.js && node --check scripts/mock-mcp-lab.js && node --check scripts/framework-cli.js && node --check scripts/validate-rebind-evidence.js && node --check scripts/validate-contracts.js && node --check scripts/validate-dashboard-service.js && node --check scripts/validate-operator-vm-installer.js && bash -n scripts/setup-operator-vm.sh scripts/clean-operator-vm.sh scripts/deploy-operator-ssh.sh scripts/clean-operator-ssh.sh scripts/dns-route53-records.sh
